creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #3)
I'll investigate the issue, but this seems to be a regression in qt6-multimedia 6.7.3. There were a lot of changes to the gstreamer plugin since 6.7.2, so it may take a while to sift through those. I don't think it's a problem with the gstreamer update as mkvtoolnix runs fine with gstreamer 1.24.8 and qt 6.7.2.
